trigger_condition: Coach closes browser tab or navigates away while PAUSED
potential_consequence: Timer drifts or session stays locked in PAUSED state if client never resumes

trigger_condition: Race condition between endSession() and pauseSession() API calls
potential_consequence: Booking ends while state machine thinks it is paused, causing inconsistent state

trigger_condition: No guard against PAUSED status when processing auto-confirm Quick Completes
potential_consequence: Auto-confirmation might unexpectedly complete a session that is merely paused, not abandoned
